title: « Group by » feature on Android devices
excerpt:
Hi, 
The « Group by » feature is awesome. We use it a lot on the Web version and on our iOS devices. But on Android devices (Phones and Tablets) this feature doesn’t work. Do you plan to implement it in a next Android re…

posts.author: simdion (Simon Dion)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

The « Group by » feature is awesome. We use it a lot on the Web version and on our iOS devices. But on Android devices (Phones and Tablets) this feature doesn’t work. Do you plan to implement it in a next Android release ?

Regards,

Simon
